recent_calls.summary: The agent confirmed Zachary Schaefer's appointment scheduled for 12 PM today with technician Devon and informed him about the notification process. The user confirmed his details and the appointment status. No further assistance was requested.
The user called Budget and requested to speak to a real person instead of the virtual assistant. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.

The user called to inquire about the repair plan under their home warranty. The agent explained the process, including warranty coverage review and repair options, and offered to provide more details or discuss upgrades. The call ended before the user could provide more specifics or complete the conversation.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user requested to speak with someone about their warranty. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call. The call ended with a transfer to another agent.
The user requested to speak to a real person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to reach Amy and was connected to an agent named Sophie. Sophie attempted to transfer the call to another live agent to assist the user further. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

The user requested assistance with a room and wanted to speak to a representative. The agent attempted to clarify the service needed but then transferred the call to a live agent as requested. The call was successfully transferred.

The user called to inquire about a standard residential installation and provided their name, homeowner status, phone number, but the call ended before the service address was given or the request was completed.

Cheryl called to schedule an appointment for air conditioner service under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details, including the dispatch number and preferred service time for tomorrow, and offered information about home maintenance programs, which Cheryl accepted. The call ended with the agent confirming that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact Cheryl soon.

The user called to request an ETA for an installation on a Ford vehicle and asked to speak with CG. The agent confirmed the user's phone number and attempted to transfer the call to CG for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The user called to speak with someone in permits, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate department. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with their representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user called to speak with Shannon Gregory and had some questions about financing options. The agent provided a brief overview of financing options but the user preferred to speak directly with Shannon Gregory. The call was then transferred to the appropriate agent.

The user called to schedule an urgent appointment for an air conditioner that was not cooling. The agent confirmed details, found the soonest available slot for the same day, and provisionally booked the appointment. However, the user then decided to cancel the request before the call ended.
The user called to make a payment, but the agent did not have direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user called and provided their ZIP code, then requested to speak to a manager. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with CG, and the agent attempted to connect the user to the appropriate live agent. The call was successfully transferred to another number for further assistance.

Sylvester Williams called to inquire about the ETA for installers on a job at Hoard. The agent confirmed Sylvester's details and informed him that the appointment is scheduled for 3 PM onwards, with a technician named Rich assigned. Sylvester was assured he would receive a call when the technician is on the way.

The user called to schedule an appointment for an inspection that was neither related to home warranty nor water heater. The agent attempted to clarify the type of inspection but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent apologized for mispronouncing the user's name and then transferred the call to another agent as requested.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called before regular business hours and requested to speak with a live agent. The assistant informed the user that a live agent was not available at the moment and offered to take a message for follow-up. The user decided to call back later when the office opens.

Alex Booker requested a callback regarding an air conditioning coil installed on June 24th that is now making sounds. The agent confirmed the details, noted the urgency due to HSA involvement, and scheduled a callback for the same day. Alex declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user called to inquire about the office opening time. The agent informed the user that the office opens at 8 AM Monday through Friday. The call ended shortly after without further interaction.

The user called to inquire about the time of their appointment. The agent informed the user that appointment details are not accessible outside business hours and that the team will contact them on the next business day to confirm. The call ended courteously with no further requests from the user.

The user, Brenda, requested a call first thing in the morning regarding an AC repair, expressing concerns about warranty coverage and charges. The agent confirmed the details, noted Brenda's preferred call time at 8 AM, and offered information about maintenance programs, which Brenda declined. Brenda provided positive feedback about the interaction, and the call ended with the agent assuring follow-up.

The user called to cancel a morning appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent informed the user that cancellations cannot be processed after hours but assured that the request would be forwarded to the team for follow-up on the next business day. The user expressed gratitude and ended the call politely.

Puline called to schedule an air conditioning service appointment for the soonest available time, reporting that her AC is not cooling and this is her third call about the issue this summer. The agent confirmed her service address and contact details, noted her request, and informed her that the team will reach out to confirm the appointment. Puline declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Robert called to schedule a cooling service appointment for a unit that is blowing hot air. The agent noted the issue and the preferred appointment time of tomorrow at 11 AM, and confirmed the service address. The agent will pass the request to the team for confirmation on the next business day.

Leatricia called after hours to report an issue with a lot of condensation and requested to speak to a representative. The agent informed her that no live representative was available at the time but documented the issue and assured a callback on the next business day. The call ended with the user acknowledging and thanking the agent.

The call was an inbound after-hours inquiry where the agent requested the user's service address ZIP code to assist further. However, the user did not respond, and the call ended due to inactivity without any further interaction.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and a prompt for the user to respond. The user did not engage or provide any information before hanging up.

The user called to confirm if a work order for an air conditioning unit was marked as completed on June 24, intending to update the service status and issue a recall. The call ended abruptly after the user repeated "Hello?" without further response from the agent.

The user called after hours requesting to speak with a representative. The agent informed the user that a live representative was not available but offered to take information for a callback. The user declined to provide details and ended the call politely.
The call was very brief with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.

The user called to inquire about the earliest possible installation date for a unit after receiving a quote. The agent explained the process, including shipment and scheduling, and offered to note preferred dates, but the user declined. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.

Lauren called to return Nicole's earlier call and had a few questions before scheduling. The agent attempted to connect her with a live agent and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation occurred after the transfer.

The user, Sheena from American Home Shield, called to get an update on a dispatch number related to buyer Kesha Green. The agent confirmed the details but could not find an appointment for the dispatch number and offered to transfer the call to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred.
The user requested to speak to the parts manager, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user called to return a call and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent confirmed the user's identity and initiated the transfer without any issues.

The user called Budget and was impressed that the agent recognized their call. The user had a question about their estimate, but the call was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about a previous service visit and whether permits were needed for work on their stack, but the call was disrupted as the user experienced silence and background noise without agent response. The user expressed confusion and frustration before hanging up.

The user called to check the status of parts for a recent service or repair. The agent confirmed the request and assured the user that the team would follow up with an update. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no further requests.

The user, Marvin Sanchez, called to request a technician for a cooling issue with the AC unit on the second floor through his home warranty. The agent confirmed details including the service address, dispatch number, and contact preferences, and assured Marvin that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. The user preferred phone contact and declined to provide an email.
